      "それは「新しい憲法上の決着」を持っています。",
      "それは「再分配政治への確固たる関心」を持っています。",
      "それは貧困削減へのコミットメントを持っています。",
      "それは福祉国家拡大へのコミットメントを持っています。",
      "それは経済的実用主義を持っています。",
      "それは自由化された市場へのコミットメントを持っています。",
      "それは「責任ある資本主義」へのコミットメントを持っています。",
      "それは金融規制と税制への軽微なアプローチを持っています。",
      "それは世界的に未開発の地域を改善することに焦点を当てています。"
    ],

      "それはトニー・ブレア下のニューレイバーのイデオロギーとの違いによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは市場主導の改革への熱意が低いことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは国家の役割により熱心であることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは労働組合との労働党のつながりへの批判が少ないことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは憲法改正により重点を置いていることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは「新しい憲法上の決着」の考えを進めることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは「再分配政治への確固たる関心」によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは貧困削減へのコミットメントによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは福祉国家拡大へのコミットメントによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは経済的実用主義によって特徴づけられます。"

      "不明"

      "それはトニー・ブレア下のニューレイバーによって影響を受けました。",
      "それはニューレイバーの経済的実用主義によって影響を受けました。",

      "それはゴードン・ブラウンの「公平さ、管理、協力」という説明によって影響を受けました。",
      "それはゴードン・ブラウンの「自由放任市場の弱点」という批判によって影響を受けました。",
      "それは「複雑さ、相互接続性、協力」によって影響を受けました。",

About: It is about the social democratic political ideology of Gordon Brown and his followers.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Gordon Brown.
It is associated with the Labour Party.
It is associated with proponents referred to as Brownites.
BelongsTo: It belongs to social democratic political ideology.
CreatedBy: It was created by Gordon Brown.
HasA: It has a distinction from the ideology of New Labour under Tony Blair.
It has a "new constitutional settlement".
It has a "robust concern for redistributive politics".
It has commitments to reducing poverty.
It has commitments to expanding the welfare state.
It has economic pragmatism.
It has commitments to liberalised markets.
It has commitments to "responsible capitalism".
It has light-touch approaches to financial regulation and tax.
It has focuses on improving globally under-developed regions.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterised by its distinction from the ideology of New Labour under Tony Blair.
It is characterised by tolerating less enthusiasm about market driven reforms.
It is characterised by being more keen on the role of the state.
It is characterised by being less critical of Labour's links to the unions.
It is characterised by placing more emphasis on constitutional reform.
It is characterised by advancing ideas of a "new constitutional settlement".
It is characterised by a "robust concern for redistributive politics".
It is characterised by commitments to reducing poverty.
It is characterised by commitments to expanding the welfare state.
It is characterised by economic pragmatism.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Gordon Brown.
It was influenced by New Labour under Tony Blair.
It was influenced by the economic pragmatism of New Labour.
It was influenced by the 2008 Financial Crisis.
It was influenced by Gordon Brown's description of "fairness, stewardship and cooperation".
It was influenced by Gordon Brown's criticism of the "weaknesses of unbridled free markets".
It was influenced by "complexity, inter-connectedness, and cooperation".
It was influenced by focuses on improving globally under-developed regions.
It was influenced by improving human rights.
It was influenced by global social justice.
IsA: It is a social democratic political ideology.
It is understood as a social democratic ideology.
It is a departure from New Labour ideology.
KnownAs: It is known as the ideology of Gordon Brown.
It is known as the ideology of those that follow Gordon Brown.
KnownFor: It is known for its distinction from New Labour.
It is known for its emphasis on constitutional reform.
It is known for its "robust concern for redistributive politics".
It is known for its commitments to reducing poverty.
It is known for its commitments to expanding the welfare state.
It is known for its economic pragmatism.
It is known for its "responsible capitalism".
It is known for its light-touch approaches to financial regulation and tax.
It is known for its focus on "complexity, inter-connectedness, and cooperation".
It is known for its hesitance towards liberal interventionism.
MemberOf: It is a member of the Labour Party.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Premiership of Gordon Brown.
PartOf: It is part of the Labour Party's ideology.
It is part of Gordon Brown's political identity.
